chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.382 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection at ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 30.12.2021 None present for the applicant Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG Mr. Faraz Ahmed Khan, advocate for respondent No.4 ------------------------------ None is in attendance on behalf of the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Learned DPG and learned counsel for respondent No.4 are in attendance. Absence of the applicant and his counsel shows their lack of interest to pursue this criminal miscellaneous application, which is accordingly dismissed on account of non-prosecution. JUDGE Zahid/*
